package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoroutineDerivedContextUnmanaged() string {
    ruleID := "goroutine_derived_context_unmanaged"
    family := "concurrency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Likely long-lived goroutines launched after a derived context is created and before the matching cancel call is observed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
